notice.body:
All plugin information entered in this form will be public.
Anyone can register a package, even if they are not the original author.

submitBar.authorHint: If you are the author, please fill this in when possible.

jsonImport.title: JSON input
jsonImport.description: Paste JSON in the same format as template.json. Matching items will be partially overwritten, and unmatched ids will be added as new entries. You can add multiple packages at once.

errors.jsonNoTargets: There are no target entries to overwrite.
errors.packageFileUnavailable: Package file import is not available.
errors.packageFileParseFailed: Failed to parse the package file.
errors.packageFileExtension: Select a file in `.au2pkg.zip` format. If that does not apply, enter the steps manually.
errors.packageFileNoCopyTargets: No files to copy were found under the supported directories.
errors.versionHashPickTitle: Select a file to calculate XXH3_128
errors.versionHashUnavailable: File selection is not available. Run this in a Tauri environment.
errors.draftNotFound: The selected temporary draft could not be found.
errors.draftSaveFailed: Failed to save the temporary draft.
errors.draftIdRequired: An ID is required to save a draft.
errors.restoreImageSourceMissing: Could not reload the original file for {{label}}: {{sourcePath}}
errors.batchBlocked: Submission blocked because tests are incomplete: {{preview}}
errors.installerDetectIncomplete: The detected version is missing or marked as unknown, so the test cannot be treated as complete.
errors.uninstallerMissingTarget: The removal target could not be found, so the test could not be completed.
